what_it_does: This file is a ledger attachment record that links the design-assets channel to a specific image asset target.
observations: target is image://design-assets/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 5
No body content or code symbols
standouts: Attachment target is an image URI with a human-readable, space-containing asset name: 'Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 5'
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a Markdown file
Uses an image:// URI scheme for asset targets
concerns: Target URI is opaque and contains spaces, making resolution uncertain
No description, alt text, or metadata about the image content
No author or provenance beyond the timestamp
notes: A channel-memory attachment record that registers a design image frame under the design-assets channel.
questions: Who added this attachment and why?
Does the image:// URI resolve to an actual stored file?
How does this frame relate to other frames in the 'Visual Assets - Dev Space' set?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it records an image attachment for a channel.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register and make discoverable a specific design image frame as an attachment within the design-assets channel.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI target with a human-readable, space-containing asset name rather than a conventional file path.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel and an image asset, which a fused system would keep as a reference for asset retrieval and provenance.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that records an image asset named 'Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 5' attached to the design-assets channel on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog and make discoverable a specific design image frame within the design-assets channel.
